description:
The GeometryLineBrushTool component is further explained on the 
Geometry Line Brush page.

fields.LineStyles: A list of line styles this tool can possibly draw.
fields.Profile: the color profile of lines drawn by this tool.
fields.UseRelativeMinimumPointDistance: disable the size of the previous line size affecting minimum point distance.
fields.RelativeMinimumPointDistanceRatio: how much size affects the minimum distance allowed between points. Affects how if a segment is bigger, that the next point has a bigger minimum place distance from that point.
fields.PressureAffectsSize: Whether tool pressure affects line size.
fields.MaterialPreviews: A list of renderers showing previews of materials.
fields._sizeKnob: The slot being used as a size selector knob for this brush.

methods.ChangeSize: Handles changing the size of the brush of a brush tool.
